calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espey for (administrator) Linda Wright.

The Court stated that there are issues with the affidavit and asked if it could be distributed to a blocked account. Ms. Espey stated that the goal is to get the share to the minor into a blocked account, that in regards to the parent signing for the minor stated that the websites in Alameda and Santa Clara Counties mention that a settlement agreement can be signed by a parent but that it is not an actual local rule. Ms. Espey further stated that they hope that the court will order it directly into a blocked account otherwise it will get held in the estate, that other heirs are waiting for their distribution and that this is delaying distribution. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy C. Robles. (Not Reported)
